name: "Community Feedback & Use Cases"

title: "[FEEDBACK] "
labels: discussion, community
---

### Your Test Results
If you tested Metarc on your own data, we'd love to see the numbers!

- **Data type:** (e.g., Node.js projects, Go monorepo, logs, backups...)
- **Total size:** - **Metarc (marc) size:** - **Standard (tar.zst) size:** - **Observation:** (Did it perform better? Worse? About the same?)

### Your Use Case
How do you see Metarc fitting into your workflow?
(e.g., "I have 100 microservices with 80% shared dependencies", "I'm looking for a way to archive long-term logs with structural awareness"...)

### Metacompression Idea / Suggestion
After reading the article, do you have an idea for a "structural" optimization? 
(e.g., A specific way to handle JSON, Protobuf, or specific source code patterns).

### General Comments
Any other thoughts, questions, or "aha!" moments you had while testing the tool?

---
*Thank you for contributing to the exploration of the "forgotten layer"!*
